name: Get views with camelCase order
description: TC-VIEWS-ORDER: GET /api/content/views?order=updatedAt+desc must not 500 (audit follow-up to v1.0.37)

steps.name: order=updatedAt desc does not 500
REQUIRE: Request should complete without error
REQUIRE: Response should not be nil
